final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial food photograph of a meticulously plated French main course — slow-cooked duck breast with black truffle sauce.

Style/medium: fine-dining editorial food photography, Michelin three-star restaurant aesthetic, photorealistic
Composition: 45-degree angle close-up, shallow depth of field, focus on the sliced duck breast, background softly blurred
Subject: slow-cooked duck breast with perfect rose-pink gradient center, golden crispy skin with visible texture, celery root purée base, micro herbs, edible flowers, concentrated red wine jus drops
Scene/backdrop: white matte bone china plate on dark marble tabletop, silver knife and fork placed beside, deep red Burgundy wine glass with wine traces on inner wall
Lighting/mood: side backlight (rim light) emphasizing texture and sheen of ingredients, moody and luxurious atmosphere
Color palette: warm rose-pink and golden brown as anchors, deep burgundy as accent, muted dark marble and white porcelain as base
Materials/textures: crispy seared duck skin with visible grain, velvety celery root purée, delicate micro herbs, matte bone china, polished silverware, wine glass condensation
Avoid: oversaturated colors, plastic-looking food, harsh front lighting, cluttered composition, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic
